🆚 Why Claude-Flow v3? Claude-Flow v3 introduces **self-learning neural capabilities** that no other agent orchestration framework offers. While competitors require manual agent configuration and static routing, Claude-Flow learns from every task execution, prevents catastrophic forgetting of successful patterns, and intelligently routes work to specialized experts.
